name: Haldi
description: A vibrant and joyful ceremony where turmeric paste was lovingly applied to the couple, blessing them with radiance and prosperity. The air was filled with laughter, folk songs, and the golden glow of marigolds.

name: Mehendi
description: An enchanting evening where intricate henna patterns were drawn on Priya's hands and feet. The designs told their love story — from their first meeting to the wedding day — in delicate, swirling motifs.

name: Sangeet
description: A night of music, dance, and pure celebration. Both families performed choreographed dances, and the couple shared their first dance under a shower of rose petals. The night ended with fireworks lighting up the Udaipur sky.

name: Wedding
description: The sacred union of two souls. The wedding ceremony was a breathtaking blend of Vedic rituals and royal grandeur. As they took the Saptapadi — seven sacred steps — they promised each other a lifetime of love, respect, and togetherness.

name: Reception
description: An elegant evening reception under the stars, with the shimmering lake as the backdrop. Guests celebrated the newlyweds with heartfelt toasts, gourmet dining, and dancing that lasted until midnight.
